title: Seresto Flea and Tick Control Collar for Cats - NEW Sustainable Pack
features: 7-8 months protection in a single application - No need to remember monthly treatments. Recommended by vets - UK's No.1 flea and tick collar* Kynetec data October MAT 2023.
Clinically proven to kill fleas and repel and kill ticks - No biting required, reducing the risk of transmission of tick-borne diseases1
Built in safety-release mechanisms - Provides peace of mind for more adventurous pets
Easy application and use - No mess, grease or smell
New, more sustainable pack* - Recyclable moulded fibre pack produces 70% reduction in carbon footprint.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: The product is water resistant; it remains effective if the animal becomes wet. However, prolonged, intense exposure to water or extensive shampooing should be avoided as the duration of activity may be reduced.
